title: colysis selliguea
intro: Colysis selliguea is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae, commonly known as the polypody fern family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds, which are beneficial for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Colysis selliguea include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory problems, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. In herbal preparations, the leaves of Colysis selliguea can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are believed to promote overall well-being and improve immune function.
